nasb.text: But refuse foolish and ignorant speculations, knowing that they produce quarrels.

esv.text: Have nothing to do with foolish, ignorant controversies; you know that they breed quarrels.

cnv.text: 你要拒絕愚蠢無知的問難；你知道這些事會引起爭論。

ccb.text: 不要参与愚昧无知的辩论，因为这些事只会引起纷争。

csbs.text: 要拒绝愚拙无知的辩论，因为你知道这些只会引起争斗，
